research_basis: Social norms and etiquette education (Emily Post Institute, etiquette guides), prosocial behavior development, social awareness and relationship skills (SEL framework), host-guest social contracts, age-appropriate party behavior expectations, gift-giving customs, gratitude norms, conflict resolution in social settings
